nasb.text: and the Avvites made Nibhaz and Tartak; and the Sepharvites burned their children in the fire to Adrammelech and Anammelech the gods of Sepharvaim.

esv.text: and the Avvites made Nibhaz and Tartak; and the Sepharvites burned their children in the fire to Adrammelech and Anammelech, the gods of Sepharvaim.

cnv.text: 亞瓦人做了匿哈和他珥他像，西法瓦音人用火焚燒自己的兒女，獻給西法瓦音的神亞得米勒和亞拿米勒。

ccb.text: 亚瓦人造匿哈和他珥他神像，西法瓦音人焚烧儿女向他们的神明亚得米勒和亚拿米勒献祭。
